Name: PublicSite
HeaderHtml:
<meta property="keywords" content="[page[keywords]]" />
<meta property="description" content="[page[description]]" />
<meta property="og:locale" content="[[culture]]" />
<meta property="og:type" content="website" />
<meta property="og:title" content="[page[title]]" />
<meta property="og:description" content="[page[description]]" />
<meta property="og:url" content="[page[url]]" />
<meta property="og:site_name" content="[app[name]]" />
<meta property="og:image" content="[app[root]]Api/DMS/Content/CompanyLogoTransparent.png" />
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image" />
<meta name="twitter:title" content="[page[title]]" />
<meta name="twitter:description" content="[page[description]]" />
<meta name="theme-color" content="#0E4A7A" />
<meta charset="utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
<link rel="canonical" href="[page[url]]" />
<link rel="stylesheet" media="screen" href="/everything.min.css" />
[theme[template]]
<style>
    :root {
        --public-ink: #10243f;
        --public-accent: #0e4a7a;
        --public-accent-soft: #d8eaf8;
        --public-highlight: #52bcff;
        --public-surface: rgba(255,255,255,0.86);
        --public-border: rgba(16,36,63,0.12);
        --public-shadow: 0 28px 60px rgba(16,36,63,0.12);
    }
    body.PublicSite {
        background:
            radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(82,188,255,0.2), transparent 32%),
            radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(14,74,122,0.14), transparent 28%),
            linear-gradient(180deg, #f4f8fc 0%, #ffffff 45%, #f7fbff 100%);
        color: var(--public-ink);
    }
    .public-site-shell {
        min-height: 100vh;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
    }
    .public-site-header {
        position: sticky;
        top: 0;
        z-index: 1040;
        backdrop-filter: blur(18px);
        background: rgba(255,255,255,0.82);
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--public-border);
    }
    .public-site-header .navbar {
        padding: 0.9rem 0;
    }
    .public-site-header .navbar-brand img {
        max-height: 64px;
        width: auto;
    }
    .public-site-header .nav-link {
        color: var(--public-ink);
        font-weight: 600;
        letter-spacing: 0.02em;
    }
    .public-site-header .nav-link:hover,
    .public-site-header .nav-link:focus {
        color: var(--public-accent);
    }
    .public-site-header .btn-outline-primary {
        border-color: rgba(14,74,122,0.24);
    }
    .public-site-main {
        flex: 1;
        padding: 2rem 0 4rem;
    }
    .public-section {
        margin-bottom: 2rem;
    }
    .public-surface {
        background: var(--public-surface);
        border: 1px solid var(--public-border);
        border-radius: 24px;
        box-shadow: var(--public-shadow);
    }
    .public-footer {
        padding: 1.5rem 0 2rem;
        color: rgba(16,36,63,0.72);
    }
    .public-footer a {
        color: var(--public-accent);
        font-weight: 600;
        text-decoration: none;
    }
    .public-footer a:hover,
    .public-footer a:focus {
        text-decoration: underline;
    }
    @media (max-width: 991.98px) {
        .public-site-header .navbar-brand img {
            max-height: 52px;
        }
        .public-site-main {
            padding-top: 1.5rem;
        }
    }
</style>
Html:
• About
  • Why Us
  • FAQ
  • Contact
  • Documentation
  • Open Platform
Cloud software, standards-first

Modern bespoke platforms built for connected businesses.

cCoder helps teams replace brittle integration patterns and mounting technical debt with carefully engineered cloud platforms, shared standards, and software that is easier to evolve.

Notify me Talk to us Explore the platform

The current notify and contact actions open a pre-addressed email draft so the live site keeps a working public contact path while the old form handlers remain retired.

Standards

Shared conventions, reusable domain services, and consistent public APIs.

Delivery

Deployment-ready platforms with content management, workflows, security, and documentation built in.

Clarity

Architecture and implementation choices designed to stay understandable as products grow.

Momentum

A platform baseline that gives teams a faster route from idea to production.

A connected vision of the future.

Introducing cCoder, a software solutions provider committed to helping businesses drive innovation and achieve seamless connectivity through improved software standards.

We understand that standardization is key to creating a more efficient and collaborative ecosystem that allows businesses to thrive in today's dynamic marketplace. Our team focuses on software that is secure, adaptable, and grounded in technical excellence.

Compliance to standards

Shared contracts and predictable integration surfaces reduce friction between systems and teams.

Careful software excellence

Strong engineering discipline keeps platforms maintainable, resilient, and ready for change.

Community focused

The best solutions create space for collaboration, learning, and sustainable delivery.

Mission

Our Mission

We help businesses achieve their goals by connecting them with strong technical direction, practical delivery habits, and software solutions that drive measurable results.

Plan

Our Plan

We combine expert guidance, reusable platform building blocks, and a standards-aligned delivery model so teams can plan confidently and ship with less rework.

Vision

Our Vision

We believe in a future where technical debt is no longer the tax on progress, and where engineering teams can focus on quality, clarity, and durable growth.

FAQ

Questions we hear often.

A quick overview of how we think about bespoke cloud solutions, technical excellence, and delivery support.

Bespoke development solutions in the cloud are customised software products designed for a specific business or industry and hosted in cloud infrastructure so they remain flexible, scalable, and easier to evolve.

Technical excellence keeps solutions reliable, scalable, secure, and maintainable. It is what allows teams to move faster later rather than paying for shortcuts repeatedly.

We support ongoing improvement with maintenance, platform guidance, and the engineering feedback needed to keep software current, secure, and effective over time.

We care deeply about standards, clear public APIs, and product-quality engineering. The result is software that feels more coherent internally and more useful externally.

We support a range of industries, especially where integration complexity, long-lived processes, and evolving compliance needs make software quality and adaptability especially valuable.
Contact

Let's start a useful conversation.

Whether you want to talk about standards alignment, platform work, bespoke delivery, or future plans, we're happy to hear from you.

Email

info@ccoder.co.uk

Phone

+44 (0)7450 233 683

LinkedIn

Connect with Paul Ward

Choose the quickest route

The legacy public forms are no longer backed by a working anonymous handler. This baseline replaces them with two explicit, testable actions that open a ready-to-send email draft.

Notify me

Use this when you want product or platform updates.

Open notify email

Project enquiry

Use this when you want to discuss a platform, product, or consulting need.

Open contact email

You can also reach us directly using the contact details opposite if you prefer your own mail client or a phone call.

Name: Documentation
HeaderHtml:
<meta property="keywords" content="[page[keywords]]" />
<meta property="description" content="[page[description]]" />
<meta property="og:locale" content="[[culture]]" />
<meta property="og:type" content="website" />
<meta property="og:title" content="Welcome to [app[name]]" />
<meta property="og:description" content="[resource_displayname[sitedescription]]" />
<meta property="og:url" content="[app[root]]" />
<meta property="og:site_name" content="[app[name]]" />
<meta name="theme-color" content="#0E4A7A">
<meta charset="utf-8"/>

<link rel="canonical" href="[page[url]]" />
<link rel="stylesheet" media="screen" href="/everything.min.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/file-icon-vectors@1.0.0/dist/file-icon-vectors.min.css" />

[theme[template]]

<style>
    :root {
		--header-height: 118px;
	}

    td, th {
        border: 1px solid #CCC;
        padding: 2px 4px;
    }

    section[name=body] h2, h3, h4 {
        margin-bottom: 10px;
        margin-left: 0;
        padding-left: 0;
        margin-bottom: 0;
    }

    p { max-width: 90%; }
    img { max-width: 99%; }

    .border-right { border-right: [theme[border.style]]; }

    .Documentation .component {
        box-shadow: none;
        border: none;
    }

	.component[name=Sidenav] {
		height: auto;
        padding-left: 20px;
	}

	.component[name=Sidenav] ul.submenu {
		list-style-type: none;
        --bs-nav-link-padding-y: 4px;
        margin: 5px 0;
        padding-left: 14px;
	}

    .component[name=Sidenav] .navbar-nav .nav-link.active {
        color: [theme[colours.secondary]];
        border-bottom: solid 2px [theme[colours.secondary]];
    }

    .component[name=Sidenav] .navbar-nav .nav-link {
        padding: 2px;
        margin: 2px;
        display: inline;
    }
</style>
